from datetime import datetime


def sort_events_by_priority(events: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return sorted(events, key=lambda e: compute_priority(e["type"], e["severity"], e["timestamp"]))


def sort_users_by_score(users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return sorted(users, key=lambda u: calculate_reputation(u["posts"], u["karma"], u["age_days"]))


def sort_products_by_relevance(products: list[dict], query: str) -> list[dict]:
    return sorted(products, key=lambda p: compute_relevance_score(p["title"], p["description"], query))


def sort_tasks_by_urgency(tasks: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return sorted(tasks, key=lambda t: datetime.strptime(t["due_date"], "%Y-%m-%d").timestamp() * urgency_weight(t["priority"]))


def sort_entries(entries: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return sorted(entries, key=lambda e: expensive_hash(e["key"]) + expensive_normalize(e["value"]))
